title: helianthemum apenninum var. polifolium
intro: Helianthemum apenninum var. polifolium, also known as Rockrose or Herb-Royale, is a perennial plant that belongs to the family Cistaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial actions. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. Helianthemum apenninum var. polifolium can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions.
